label: Moody noir
descriptor: low-key lighting, single hard key light at 45 degrees, deep shadows, monochrome with a single accent color, dramatic chiaroscuro, 35mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 800, atmosphere: tense, contemplative.

label: Soft editorial
descriptor: diffused window light + reflector fill, neutral pastel palette, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 200, atmosphere: serene, considered.

label: Symmetric pastel
descriptor: perfectly centered composition, flat front lighting, saturated pastel palette (mustard, salmon, teal), 50mm lens, f/8, atmosphere: whimsical, ordered.

label: Warm directional cinematic
descriptor: warm key from upper right, gentle backlit haze, complementary warm/cool palette, anamorphic 2.39:1, 40mm, f/2, atmosphere: hopeful.

label: Neon noir
descriptor: neon practicals (cyan/magenta), heavy atmospheric haze, wet reflective surfaces, 28mm, f/2.8, ISO 1600, atmosphere: alienated, electric.
